title: BhavaProvenance
description: Content provenance metadata for a Bhāva story package.

permissions_status.description: Provenance category for the story content.

source_description.description: Human-readable description of the content source.

bbt_reference.description: Specific BBT publication referenced, if applicable.

permission_document.description: Path or URI to documented permission. Required when permissions_status is third_party.

reviewed_by.description: Name of the steward or reviewer who verified provenance.

reviewed_at.description: ISO date when provenance was last reviewed.
